creator: nork@ninth-nine.com
text:
Oops, anyone handle this PR?

I'm trying to use a new feature[1], but the version is outdated
and I'm having problems.

Now version: 0.61.0:
$ cfn-lint rds-mysql.yaml
E3002 Invalid Property Resources/EnvDevDBInstance/Properties/StorageThroughput
rds-mysql.yaml:42:7
$

This version: 0.72.1:
$ cfn-lint rds-mysql.yaml
$

[1] https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2022/11/amazon-rds-general-purpose-gp3-storage-volumes/
